inputs.label: Triglycerides
inputs.businessContext: Serum triglycerides level, used for LDL calculation when flag enabled

businessContext_i18n.en: Serum triglycerides level, used for LDL calculation when flag enabled
businessContext_i18n.tr: Serum trigliserit seviyesi, işaret etkinleştirildiğinde LDL hesaplaması için kullanılır
businessContext_i18n.de: Serum-Triglyceridspiegel, verwendet für LDL-Berechnung wenn Flag aktiviert

inputs.label: Calculate LDL
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to compute LDL cholesterol using Friedewald formula (valid for triglycerides <400 mg/dL)

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 to compute LDL cholesterol using Friedewald formula (valid for triglycerides <400 mg/dL)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Friedewald formülü ile LDL kolesterolü hesaplamak için 1 olarak ayarlayın (trigliserit <400 mg/dL için geçerlidir)
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf 1 setzen, um LDL-Cholesterin mit der Friedewald-Formel zu berechnen (gültig für Triglyceride <400 mg/dL)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mettre à 1 pour calculer le cholestérol LDL à l'aide de la formule de Friedewald (valable pour des triglycérides <400 mg/dL)
businessContext_i18n.es: Establecer en 1 para calcular el colesterol LDL usando la fórmula de Friedewald (válida para triglicéridos <400 mg/dL)
